name: Maribel and Renko: Hifuu Club's trip
description:
"Yo, Mary! You holdin' up alright? I know we've been walking for a while now..."

"Hm? Oh, I'm fine. Just a bit more peckish than I thought I'd be by now."

"Yeah, that checks out. Didn't think we'd be out this long either. But hey, the food shoudln't take too much longer... Mary?"

"Mmm... that sounds nice..."

"Jeez, I look away for just one second..."

Welcome, one and All! Today we have the best kind of bot for a Christmas special; one that don't fit the motif whatsoever! What's that, Christmas was 5 days ago? Details, details.

... On a more serious note, I don't think I'm going to be able to stay for much longer. What with the whole 'Digital ID' thing and all, as well as other things. I'm not particularly sure if or when this sites going to get affected, but if I'm not around or posting things... there's your answer.

Still, hope y'all have a good time here even if I'm gone, and that y'all keep chuggin on through despite whatever happens. But for now at least, I hope you enjoy this Bot, and that y'all stay safe and awesome.

(P.S. Thank you for 50 Followers.)

Characters Include:

👩👁️Maribel Hearn

👩🏻‍🦰🌟Renko Usami

🧔🏻‍♀️👓🏹Mitama Magahara

🌲👻An Yaezaki

🦅👩‍💼Tenmu Suitokuin

🧎🏻‍♀️⛩️🏹Hatsuna Magatsuji

[Link: https://www.deviantart.com/yuritho/art/Maribel-Hearn-and-Usami-Renko-746388805]
creator: Bollin
